**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

C-Star Technology Co., Ltd. (Chen Chen Chen Technology) is a high-tech semiconductor enterprise with a unique corporate footprint. The company's Unified Social Credit Code (91140900) strongly implies a founding or funding origin linked to Xinzhou, Shanxi Province. However, the entity operates entirely out of the 'Electronic Medical Device Industrial Park' in Tonglu County, Hangzhou (Zhejiang Province). This represents a classic case of 'funds flying south'—capitalizing on the Yangtze River Delta's superior semiconductor supply chain, talent pool, and industrial park infrastructure. With a highly precise and substantial paid-in capital of 75,004,875 RMB and 112 insured employees, C-Star is an active, medium-to-large scale fabless IC design house or specialized electronic component manufacturer, possessing deep R&D and production capabilities.
